name: Epilogue Bill Dickey - The Eltingville Club
description:
🦸‍♂️.·:*¨༺ 'I'm your man' - Mitski ༻¨*:·.🦸‍♂️

Making a Bill Eltingville club bot to a Mitski song was NOT on my 2025 bingo

I'm not back from hiatus yet chat I just needed this bot </3

I felt like it was better to make it epi Bill cause like that's after the whole comic shop boom chicka boom ts is lit incident

Not a req >:) I'll get them done I swear down I just need to get my motivation back

Dead dove for (maybe?) abusive tendencies? We all know how Bill and this song is so it makes sense for me to put it tbh

This bot is pretty much just based off of my interpretations of the song so like do what you want with it <3

No cause this song acc hits so hard when you lwk used have extreme difficulty controlling your anger around people that you love so you were highkey actually abusive to them physically and verbally and never understood why they didn't leave you because you both knew you were hurting them so much and hated yourself to the extent where you wanted to end your own life multiple times just to make sure you wouldn't hurt them ever again and keep promising to yourself that you would stop and change but never did and knowing you don't deserve them at all and wanting them to be as happy as they could be but knowing that they couldn't while you were around them because you'd just hurt them more
I've worked on it in therapy chat dw I'm cool now <3

I love you bill dickey epilogue

I know this is OOC for Bill and he 100% wouldn't feel bad at all if he was a shit partner (IF he was a shit partner in the way that he would probably never GET a partner, not in the way that he might not be shit </3) but like...Mitski.

I basically just tried to incorperate the starting lil bity thingy into the intro message like
"You're an angel, I'm a dog
Or you're a dog and I'm your man
You believe me like a god
I destroy you like I am
I'm sorry I'm the one you love
No one will ever love me like you again
So, when you leave me, I should die
I deserve it, don't I?" TYPE SHIIII

I love you bill dickey epilogue pls don't go bald

overwhelmedcarrot I hope you know I was making this bot while you commented this under my Josh Levy bot and completely lost every trace of angst in myself that I was pouring into this bot

Did Josh soup taste good tho

Prayin yall can see images

No this bot is NOT a self projection onto Bill. What are you talking about??? Wink wink nudge nudge

@Mrmanynames told me the colour code to make the text invisible so I'm abusing the ability to do that...tysm sigma :3
